overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a post-apocalyptic tribal settlement constructed from wooden scrap and debris, then transitioning into an open wilderness area with distinctive red vegetation and dead trees. The clip demonstrates high-fidelity game engine graphics with dynamic lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement interior with wooden barricades and scrap structures

agents.ego_description: running through the settlement interior, navigating between wooden debris and spike barricades

entered.detail: large defensive structures made of wooden logs with red painted tips
tall watchtowers constructed from wooden scaffolding and platforms
scattered metal wreckage and rusted machine parts embedded in the ground
decayed wooden cart with large wheels partially buried in dirt
large fortified entrance made of wooden beams and hanging fabric banners
large moss-covered boulders forming natural barriers

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dense tribal settlement built from scrap wood and metal debris. Large wooden spike barricades line the left side while tall watchtowers rise in the distance. The ground is a dusty dirt trail scattered with wreckage from the old world.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement gate area with wooden fortifications

events.description: tribal NPCs become visible near the settlement gate, indicating inhabited area
character slows and maneuvers around standing NPCs while approaching the gate exit

agents.ego_description: navigating through the settlement gate area while passing tribal members and avoiding obstacles

notable_agents.action: tribal warrior standing guard near the wooden gate structure
tribal member walking along the dirt path carrying equipment

entered.detail: distinctive crimson-colored grass and vegetation growing in clusters

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the settlement exit where wooden gate structures dominate the view. Several tribal NPCs stand guard or walk near the entrance. The environment transitions from dense debris to a more open gate area with visible red vegetation patches appearing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wilderness with dead trees and red vegetation patches

events.description: exits the tribal settlement completely into open natural landscape with scattered trees
terrain shifts to denser forest area with tall dead tree trunks and thicker red undergrowth

agents.ego_description: running through open wilderness, ascending gentle slopes and navigating around trees

entered.detail: leafless tree trunks with gnarled branches scattered across the landscape
massive stone outcroppings forming a hillside barrier
hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath the clouds

segments.scene_description: Having left the settlement behind, the character runs through an open wilderness landscape characterized by tall dead trees and vibrant red vegetation covering the ground. The terrain gently ascends toward distant mountains, with large rock formations visible on the horizon. The sky is fully visible and expansive.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a scrap-built tribal settlement into a vast, open wilderness. It begins by tracking the character through a dense corridor of wooden spike barricades and metal debris, with tall watchtowers looming over a dusty dirt trail. As the character approaches the settlement exit, the scenery opens up around wooden gate structures and tribal guards, while patches of vibrant red vegetation begin to emerge on the periphery. The scene then expands fully into a wild landscape as the character leaves the gates behind, moving across ground covered in red flora and past towering dead trees. Finally, the terrain gently ascends toward a horizon of large rock formations and distant mountains under an expansive, open sky.
